plot outline: 'Marriage Story' is Academy-Award-nominated filmmaker Noah Baumbach's incisive and compassionate look at a marriage breaking up--and a family staying together. The film stars Scarlett Johansson and Adam Driver and co-stars Laura Dern, Alan Alda, and Ray Liotta.
title: Marriage Story
akas: 婚姻故事 (Hong Kong, Cantonese title)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
